scenarios.name: Template catalog returns all predefined strategies

blockers: Backtest uses an OHLCV-compatible starter variant; ADX and highest-high breakout semantics require a future native evaluator for full document fidelity.
entry_rules: Close is above EMA(20) and SMA(50).
ADX(14) is above 25.
Price breaks above the prior 20-period high.
Volume is above 1.5x the 20-period average.
exit_rules: Close falls below EMA(20) or SMA(50).
ADX(14) falls below 20.
Trailing stop is hit at roughly 2x ATR from entry.
data.name: Trend Following (Multi-Timeframe)
data.pine_code:
ema20 = ta.ema(close, 20)
sma50 = ta.sma(close, 50)
rsi14 = ta.rsi(close, 14)
buy = close > ema20 and close > sma50 and rsi14 > 55
sell = close < ema20 or close < sma50
if buy
    strategy.entry("LONG", strategy.long)
if sell
    strategy.close("LONG")
risk_rules: Target 1% to 1.5% account risk per trade.
Stop new risk after 3% daily loss.
Reduce size by 50% at 10% drawdown and stop at 15% drawdown.
data.summary: Captures persistent directional moves using moving-average trend filters, trend strength, breakout confirmation, and ATR risk controls.

blockers: Backtest uses an OHLCV-compatible starter variant; prior resistance, Bollinger width, time stops, and 2R exits require future native support for full document fidelity.
entry_rules: Close breaks above 20-period resistance.
Volume is above 2x average.
RSI(14) is between 50 and 70.
Bollinger Band width is above 6%.
exit_rules: Close falls below the entry candle low.
RSI(14) exceeds 75.
Target 2R profit or exit after 5 days without 1R progress.
data.name: Momentum Breakout (Volume-Confirmed)
data.pine_code:
rsi14 = ta.rsi(close, 14)
vol20 = ta.sma(volume, 20)
basis = ta.sma(close, 20)
buy = close > basis and volume > vol20 and rsi14 > 50 and rsi14 < 70
sell = close < basis or rsi14 > 75
if buy
    strategy.entry("LONG", strategy.long)
if sell
    strategy.close("LONG")
risk_rules: Risk 1% per trade with volatility adjustment.
data.summary: Targets expansion after consolidation when price clears resistance with strong volume and non-overbought momentum.

blockers: Backtest uses an OHLCV-compatible starter variant; lower-band and time-stop logic should move into a future native evaluator for full document fidelity.
entry_rules: Close is below the lower Bollinger Band.
RSI(2) is below 10.
Close remains above SMA(200).
Volume spike is above 1.5x average.
exit_rules: Close touches the middle Bollinger Band.
RSI(2) exceeds 50.
Exit after 3 days or on ATR-based stop below entry-day low.
data.name: Adaptive Mean Reversion
data.pine_code:
rsi2 = ta.rsi(close, 2)
sma200 = ta.sma(close, 200)
basis = ta.sma(close, 20)
buy = close < basis and close > sma200 and rsi2 < 10
sell = close >= basis or rsi2 > 50
if buy
    strategy.entry("LONG", strategy.long)
if sell
    strategy.close("LONG")
risk_rules: Pause new signals around severe volatility or 12% drawdown.
data.summary: Buys statistically extreme oversold moves in broader uptrends and exits into the mean.

blockers: Current evaluator accepts one candle stream only.
Current execution engine does not support multi-leg spread orders.
entry_rules: Open spread when z-score exceeds +/-2.0.
Only trade pairs with confirmed cointegration p-value below 0.05.
Require mean-reversion half-life below 20 days.
exit_rules: Exit when z-score returns inside +/-0.5.
Stop if z-score extends beyond +/-3.5.
Exit after holding period exceeds two half-lives.
data.name: Statistical Arbitrage (Pairs Trading)
risk_rules: Recalculate cointegration monthly and halt at 15% drawdown.
data.summary: Trades temporary divergence between cointegrated assets using spread z-score and dollar-neutral legs.

blockers: Session VWAP and exchange-session calendar helpers are not implemented yet.
entry_rules: After 10:15 local session time, close is below VWAP minus 0.3x VWAP standard deviation.
RSI(14) is below 40.
Volume is above 1.2x average.
exit_rules: Exit when price crosses above VWAP.
Exit when RSI(14) exceeds 60.
Exit before market close.
data.name: VWAP Reversion
data.summary: Fades intraday institutional-flow deviations from VWAP after opening volatility settles.

blockers: Current paper engine is candle-signal based, not quote based.
entry_rules: Place bid/ask quotes when spread exceeds 0.02%.
Inventory skew is below 50% of max position.
ATR/price is below 2% and funding is near neutral.
exit_rules: Cancel or reduce quotes when inventory skew exceeds 70%.
Cancel when volatility expands above 3%.
Cancel under adverse funding or latency above threshold.
data.name: Market Making (Crypto-Focused)
risk_rules: Limit single-asset inventory to 20% of capital.
Daily loss cap of 1% and drawdown halt at 8%.
data.summary: Quotes both sides of liquid crypto books to capture spread while controlling inventory and adverse selection.

blockers: Spot/perp multi-leg execution is not implemented.
Borrow-rate and basis-risk models are missing.
entry_rules: Enter when funding rate is above 0.1% per 8h or below -0.1%.
Confirm spot-perp basis exceeds minimum threshold.
Only trade when capital is available through the next funding payment.
exit_rules: Close hedge after funding payment capture.
Exit on funding reversal or exchange-risk degradation.
data.name: Funding Rate Arbitrage
risk_rules: Daily loss cap of 1% and drawdown halt at 5%.
data.summary: Captures perpetual funding payments with hedged spot/perp or inverse spot/perp positions.

blockers: Current evaluator returns one candle signal and does not manage standing order ladders.
entry_rules: Define upper/lower range, commonly +/-10% from current price.
Create 10 to 20 equidistant levels.
Place buy orders below current price and sell orders above.
exit_rules: When a buy fills, place the matching sell one grid level higher.
When a sell fills, place the matching buy one grid level lower.
Recenter if price drifts more than 15% from grid center.
data.name: Grid Trading
risk_rules: Allocate fixed capital per grid level.
Stop all grids at 20% drawdown or strong breakout.
data.summary: Builds a ladder of buy and sell orders across a defined range to harvest oscillations in sideways markets.

blockers: Starter Pine omits MACD acceleration and ATR trailing stop because those should be represented by the backtest/risk settings or a future native evaluator.
entry_rules: Close is above SMA(50).
SMA(50) is above SMA(200).
RSI(14) is above 50 and below 70.
Momentum confirms and volume is above average.
exit_rules: Exit when core trend or RSI momentum conditions fail.
Use ATR trailing stop in execution/backtesting settings.
Use 10-day time stop when implemented natively.
data.name: Multi-Factor Momentum
data.pine_code:
sma50 = ta.sma(close, 50)
sma200 = ta.sma(close, 200)
rsi14 = ta.rsi(close, 14)
vol20 = ta.sma(volume, 20)
buy = close > sma50 and sma50 > sma200 and rsi14 > 50 and rsi14 < 70 and volume > vol20
sell = close < sma50 or rsi14 < 45
if buy
    strategy.entry("LONG", strategy.long)
if sell
    strategy.close("LONG")
risk_rules: Risk up to 2% per trade before portfolio constraints.
data.summary: Combines trend, momentum, volatility, and volume filters into a higher-confidence directional signal.

blockers: CVD, liquidation, open-interest, and order-book feeds are not available in the current data model.
entry_rules: CVD turns positive after bullish divergence.
Large bid limits appear at support.
Liquidation cascade completes with negative funding and OI drop.
exit_rules: Exit on bearish CVD divergence.
Exit near large offers at resistance.
Exit under extremely positive funding or failed absorption.
data.name: Smart Money / Order Flow
data.summary: Uses institutional flow footprints such as CVD divergence, bid/ask imbalance, liquidation cascades, open interest, and funding extremes.

scenarios.name: Oversized historical range is handled without server error
Protected API rate limit eventually returns 429

findings.finding: 4 predefined templates are intentionally blocked by missing market-data/execution infrastructure.
findings.recommendation: Keep them visible but disabled in backtesting until L2/order-flow/funding/pairs/grid state support exists.
